subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon My countenance! Upon thee be My glory and My loving-kindness. By My life, thou hast ever been beneath the glances of My grace and within [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الناظر الی وجهی علیک بهائی و عنایتی لعمری قد کنت تحت لحاظ فضلی و فی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @high station of the true believer
